ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT STANDARD MOTOR PRODUCTS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Proposed Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER's Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Proposed Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Standard Motor Products, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned Order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
